lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, hardpoint sizes, and module variants for this hull.

sources.label: Inara — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Stock hull stats, hardpoint/internal layout, and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Manufacturer (Faulcon DeLacy), role assessment, and release history.

sources.label: Fandom — Anti-Xeno Combat
sources.what: Thargoid Interceptor hearts, caustic damage, and the AX/Guardian weapon and utility kit this build is designed around.

sources.label: Fandom — Guardian Gauss Cannon
sources.what: Guardian Gauss Cannon size classes (small/medium only), heat and distributor draw, and heart-damage role.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Cobra Mk V ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.
